listings.title: Vintage Wurlitzer 200 Electric Piano
listings.body: It might need a tune up but it's playable, vibrato and sustain work. A bit of "crackling" when first turned on but play it does. The legs and wheels have normal surface wear. The three screws underneath that hold the cover in place are replaced as the originals were missing.

listings.title: LP & RhythmTech Percussion Pack
listings.body: SOLD AS A BUNDLE, WILL NOT SEPARATE. Good functional condition. Fair cosmetic condition (rust, scratches etc). *** Includes the following: 1️⃣Latin Percussion LP008-N LP 8” Ridge Rider Cowbell 2️⃣Latin Percussion Agogo Bells (one bell slightly dented) 3️⃣Latin Percussion Blue Jam Block with Bracket - High Pitch 4️⃣RhythmTech Drumset Tambourine (couple of bent jingles) Located in Yonkers, NY 10705. Shipping available. *** Check out my other listings for more drum stuff 🥁

listings.title: Tama HP900PN Iron Cobra 900 Power Glide Single Bass Drum Pedal w/ Case
listings.body: Pedal is in great shape, no issues. Includes case. NOTE: one latch has broken off, I will include it as well. Case closes fine with one operational latch. Located in Yonkers, NY 10705. Shipping available. *** Check out my other listings for more drum stuff 🥁

listings.title: Tama HH905N Iron Cobra Lever Glide Hi-hat Stand - 2-leg
listings.body: Good overall condition. A little pitting in some areas along with general cosmetic wear. Includes original clutch. Located in Yonkers, NY 10705. Shipping available. *** Check out my other listings for more drum stuff 🥁

listings.title: 🚨 WANTED: Buying Vintage & Modern Toy Collections! Cash Paid! 🧸🏎️
listings.body: Are you clearing out your attic, basement, or garage? Don’t let your old toys gather dust! I am a local collector looking to buy entire toy collections, large or small. I offer fair prices and hassle-free cash pickups right here in the Harrison / Westchester County area. 📦 What I Am Looking For: Action Figures: Star Wars, G.I. Joe, Marvel/DC, Masters of the Universe, Transformers, TMNT, Power Rangers. Die-Cast Cars: Hot Wheels (vintage or carded sets), Matchbox, Johnny Lightning, Dinky, Corgi. Video Games & Systems: Nintendo (NES, SNES, N64, Game Boy), Sega, PlayStation 1 & 2, Atari. Pop Culture & Sci-Fi: Star Trek, Doctor Who, wrestling figures, movie memorabilia. Model Kits & Trains: Unbuilt model cars/airplanes, LEGO sets (boxed or bulk), Lionel/Bachmann trains. Vintage Dolls & Playsets: Barbie (pre-1990), Polly Pocket, Strawberry Shortcake, My Little Pony. 🚫 What I Am NOT Looking For: Fast food / Happy Meal toys. Incomplete board games. Broken, heavily chewed, or water-damaged items. Generic plush animals (except vintage with rare tags). 🤝 How It Works: Send Me a Message: Tell me briefly what you have. Attach Photos: Group shots of the items are perfect—no need to take individual pictures! Get an Offer: If it fits what I collect, I will make you a cash offer for the lot. Easy Pickup: I will drive to you and handle all the heavy lifting. Location: Willing to travel around Harrison and surrounding local towns. Fast responses! Message me today with photos to turn your collection or old toys into cash!
